final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system for web dashboards, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a "classic minimalist tech" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Dieter Rams industrial design principles, Apple Human Interface Guidelines (2010s), Swiss International Style typography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple components across web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls as a cohesive system
Subject: must include all UI component types — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech, visually striking atmosphere with rich layering — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must convey strong tech aesthetic with rich visual depth and layered hierarchy
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must maintain design system consistency across all components, must achieve "cool and striking" visual impact with "extremely strong tech feel"
Avoid:
